T0371.title: Hard Default
T0371.definition: A borrower unilaterally ceases all loan repayments and deliberately cuts off contact with the lending platform.
T0371.description: Borrowers who can no longer afford high interest or who develop resistance to aggressive collection tactics choose to abandon repayment entirely. They typically change their phone numbers, delete the lending app, and brace for consequences like contact-list harassment or credit blacklisting. In underground circles, this is often discussed as a last-resort measure against predatory high-interest lenders.
T0371.usageExample: I'm going to go no-contact on that predatory lender. The interest is insane and I can't keep up. Has anyone here done this before? Will they freeze my payment accounts?

references.title: 2024 H1 Credit Fraud Risk Landscape Report
Black Market Big Data: Exposing Malicious Loan Brokers
